name: TeachMe.To Golf Lessons - Scratch Lab Golf
address: 1637 Mt Diablo Blvd STE 01, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
about: Scratch Lab Golf is an indoor golf training facility featuring premium TrackMan simulators in private climate-controlled bays. The venue offers year-round access with 24/7 availability and specializes in club fitting, gear sales, and professional coaching. Located in Walnut Creek, it provides a focused environment for golfers of all skill levels to play 400+ courses and receive technical feedback from certified instructors. Pricing is structured per lesson with rates ranging from $87.88 to $212.62 for weekly bookings, and a flexible cancellation policy allows for refunds up to 24 hours before a session.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium indoor TrackMan simulators for accurate ball and club tracking
24/7 availability and flexible scheduling with 24-hour cancellation policy
Private climate-controlled bays for focused practice and lessons
Access to 400+ golf courses and professional club fitting services
Certified coaches specializing in fundamentals and advanced strategy

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium indoor TrackMan simulators in private bays

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides a full set of golf clubs, right and left-handed options available, though bringing your own is permitted.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drink?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned, though BYOB policies aren't explicitly addressed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The venue doesn't specify average 18-hole times, but with 24/7 access and TrackMan technology, players can play at their own pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific information about youth programs or family amenities is provided.
